channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: 5 takeaways from the Arizona Senate debate
item.description: Rep. Ruben Gallego (D-Ariz.) and Republican candidate Kari Lake faced off in their only debate in the Arizona Senate race on Wednesday, as the two contenders frequently traded barbs. Gallego and Lake, who are vying for retiring Sen. Kyrsten Sinema’s (I-Ariz.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, NewsNation

item.title: Trump charges hurricane response 'worst since Katrina' as Biden argues Trump 'onslaught of lies' must 'stop'
item.description: Former President Trump, President Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris trade fire over the federal government's response to Hurricane Helene and preparations as Hurricane Milton bears down on Florida.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: House Democrats' campaign chief defends vulnerable members keeping distance from Harris
item.description: NEW YORK — Rep. Suzan DelBene (D-Wash.), the House Democrats’ campaign chief, is defending vulnerable lawmakers who have kept their distance from Vice President Harris while campaigning.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How US government will dole out aid to victims of Hurricanes Milton, Helene
item.description: As a second and possibly more devastating hurricane barrels toward the U.S., there are concerns over how the government will help pay for what could be millions in damage.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Supreme Court seems likely to give Oklahoma death row inmate a new day in court
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court appeared likely Wednesday to give Oklahoma death row inmate Richard Glossip at least another day in court in his long quest to throw out his murder conviction and death sentence.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vance’s Midwestern roots appeal to Michigan swing-county voters despite Buckeye ties
item.description: Ohio Sen. JD Vance can help former President Donald Trump win Michigan thanks to his Midwestern upbringing, which will appeal to voters in the critical swing state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump Florida resort hosts linemen before Hurricane Milton response
item.description: The Trump Organization extended an invitation to more than 200 power linemen to stay at their golf resort in Miami Wednesday, as Florida's Gulf Coast prepares for Hurricane Milton to make landfall this week.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Human Rights Campaign launching ad blitz for Harris, other Democrats
item.description: Human Rights Campaign (HRC) and its Equality Votes political action committee are launching a multimillion-dollar digital ad blitz aimed at reaching "equality voters" for the Harris-Walz ticket in key battleground states, the group announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Afghan national charged with Election Day terror plot reignites vetting concerns: ‘Glaring alarms’
item.description: The arrest of an Afghan national, who came to the U.S. after the withdrawal from Afghanistan in 2021, on terror charges is refueling concerns about the vetting of those who arrived.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris aims to help adult caregivers with Medicare benefit expansion
item.description: Vice President Harris on Tuesday introduced a new plan to expand Medicare benefits so that the program covers the costs of long-term home care for older Americans. The plan, formally announced on ABC’s “The View,” is aimed at helping the “sandwich generation” take care of their aging parents.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, NewsNation

item.title: Trump lashes out at Harris and 'The View' co-hosts, as Hurricane Milton makes landfall
item.description: Former President Donald Trump has hurled insults at his rival, Vice President Kamala Harris, and the co-hosts of ABC's “The View.”.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Michigan US Senate debate: Rogers, Slotkin race could determine control
item.description: Rogers and Slotkin meet on Tuesday for an hour-long debate hosted by Nexstar's WOOD-TV, beginning at 7 p.m. ET.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Van Gilder, Fox 5

item.title: Woodward book reveals Trump's calls with Putin and Biden's private remarks on Obama and Netanyahu
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump has had as many as seven private phone calls with Vladimir Putin since leaving office and secretly sent the Russian president COVID-19 test machines during the height of the pandemic, Bob Woodward reported in his new book, “War.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE and MEG KINNARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eric Adams appoints new first deputy mayor after Sheena Wright resigns
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – New York City Mayor Eric Adams has appointed a new first deputy mayor after Sheena Wright resigned from her position on Tuesday. Maria Torres-Springer, the deputy mayor of housing, economic development and workforce, was appointed to the position.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Fight to control NJ child care costs continues
item.description: HACKENSACK, N.J. (PIX11) - Elizabeth Velazquez is a mother to three, two of whom go to Little Learners Child Development Center in Hackensack. "My children mean the world to me," she said, holding back tears, "and I want to be able to continue to work hard every day to provide the world to them.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Michigan US Senate debate: Rogers, Slotkin race could determine control
item.description: Rogers and Slotkin meet on Tuesday for an hour-long debate hosted by Nexstar's WOOD-TV, beginning at 7 p.m. ET.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Van Gilder, NewsNation

item.title: Cruz posts $21 million fundraising haul in battle with Allred
item.description: Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) raked in $21 million in the third fundraising quarter of 2024, he announced Monday. Cruz’s team said in a statement that the total includes money raised by his reelection campaign, political action committee and joint fundraising committee.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Major North Carolina newspaper knocks Trump over Helene response 'falsehoods'
item.description: A leading newspaper in North Carolina is blasting former President Donald Trump over what it calls his "falsehoods" about the government response to Hurricane Helene, which devastated large swaths of the state last week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Johnson sidesteps question on whether Trump lost 2020 election: ‘This is a gotcha game’
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Sunday sidestepped a question about whether former President Trump lost the 2020 presidential election, calling it a “gotcha game” that he would not play.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Trump's plan would add $4 trillion more to U.S. debt compared to Harris', analysis says
item.description: Neither former President Donald Trump nor Vice President Kamala Harris have plans to fix the national debt, risking "an eventual fiscal crisis," a budget nonprofit group found in its analysis.
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett, MPR News

item.title: Hurricane Milton projected to reach Category 4 strength before landfall in Florida
item.description: A new storm is approaching the west coast of the Florida, threatening to inflict heavy rain, strong winds and flash flooding in the already-storm battered state.
item.dc:creator: Juliana Kim, MPR News

item.title: Ballots mailed out to registered voters for Presidential General Election
item.description: Registered voters in San Diego County will be receiving their ballots next week for the November Presidential General Election.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Biden says small business disaster loan program will soon run out of money
item.description: President Joe Biden says Congress needs to shore up a small business disaster loans fund, and fast. Meanwhile, the response to Hurricane Helene has become a presidential election issue.
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith, MPR News

item.title: Melania Trump says she supports abortion rights, putting her at odds with the GOP
item.description: Melania Trump has revealed her support for abortion rights ahead of the release of her upcoming memoir. Her stated position exposes a stark contrast with her husband, Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump, on the crucial election issue.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINE FERNANDO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Early voting begins in downtown Chicago
item.description: Early voting for the November election begins Thursday in downtown Chicago, with DuPage County seeing nearly double the amount of voters who turned out early in 2020, and early voting in all 50 wards opens up next Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9
